import sys, types
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
pkg = types.ModuleType\('model'\); pkg.__path__ = ['model']
sys.modules['model'] = pkg

from model.Transformer import AS2CLAD_Encoder
import torch

B, L, D = 4, 100, 12
x = torch.randn\(B, L, D\)
model = AS2CLAD_Encoder\(win_size=L, enc_in=D, d_model=512, n_heads=8,
                         e_layers=3, d_ff=512, d_proj=128, dropout=0.0\)
model.eval\(\)
with torch.no_grad\(\):
    Z, H = model\(x\)
print\(f'input  x : {x.shape}'\)
print\(f'encoder H: {H.shape}'\)
print\(f'proj    Z: {Z.shape}'\)
" 2>&1)

import sys, os, torch, torch.nn.functional as F
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from model.embedding import VariableIndependentEmbedding
from model.attn_layer import DependencyPatternModule
from model.dependency_soft_cl import *

B, T, D, d_emb, C = 2, 8, 4, 16, 32
z1 = F.normalize\(torch.randn\(B, T, C\), p=2, dim=-1\)
z2 = F.normalize\(torch.randn\(B, T, C\), p=2, dim=-1\)
x = torch.randn\(B, T, D\)
emb = VariableIndependentEmbedding\(n_vars=D, d_emb=d_emb\)
E = emb\(x\)
dep = DependencyPatternModule\(d_emb=d_emb\)
A = dep\(E\)
print\('A range:', A.min\(\).item\(\), A.max\(\).item\(\)\)
print\('A sum check:', A.sum\(-1\).min\(\).item\(\), A.sum\(-1\).max\(\).item\(\)\)

W_DC = dep_consistency_weight\(A, sigma=1.0\)
print\('W_DC range:', W_DC.min\(\).item\(\), W_DC.max\(\).item\(\)\)
print\('W_DC nan?', W_DC.isnan\(\).any\(\).item\(\)\)

W_T_list = hierarchical_soft_weights\([E], dep, tau_T_base=2.0\)
W_T = W_T_list[0]
print\('W_T range:', W_T.min\(\).item\(\), W_T.max\(\).item\(\)\)
print\('W_T nan?', W_T.isnan\(\).any\(\).item\(\)\)

loss = temporal_soft_cl_loss\(z1, z2, W_T\)
print\('loss:', loss.item\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd E:/contrastive/AS2CL-AD && /d/software/miniconda3/python.exe -c "
import torch, torch.nn.functional as F
B, T, C = 2, 8, 32
z1 = F.normalize\(torch.randn\(B, T, C\), p=2, dim=-1\)
z2 = F.normalize\(torch.randn\(B, T, C\), p=2, dim=-1\)
z = torch.cat\([z1, z2], dim=1\)
sim = torch.bmm\(z, z.transpose\(1, 2\)\)
mask_self = torch.eye\(2*T\).bool\(\).unsqueeze\(0\)
sim = sim.masked_fill\(mask_self, float\('-inf'\)\)
log_prob = F.log_softmax\(sim, dim=-1\)

W_T = torch.rand\(B, T, T\)
W_full = W_T.repeat\(1, 2, 2\)
pos_idx = torch.arange\(T\)
W_full[:, pos_idx, pos_idx + T] = 0.0
W_full[:, pos_idx + T, pos_idx] = 0.0
W_full = W_full.masked_fill\(mask_self, 0.0\)

loss_pos_fwd = -log_prob[:, pos_idx, pos_idx + T]
loss_pos_bwd = -log_prob[:, pos_idx + T, pos_idx]
print\('loss_pos_fwd:', loss_pos_fwd\)
print\('loss_pos_bwd:', loss_pos_bwd\)

loss_soft_fwd = -\(W_full[:, :T, :] * log_prob[:, :T, :]\).sum\(dim=-1\)
loss_soft_bwd = -\(W_full[:, T:, :] * log_prob[:, T:, :]\).sum\(dim=-1\)
print\('loss_soft_fwd:', loss_soft_fwd\)
print\('loss_soft_bwd:', loss_soft_bwd\)

total = \(loss_pos_fwd + loss_soft_fwd + loss_pos_bwd + loss_soft_bwd\).sum\(\)
print\('total:', total.item\(\)\)
print\('normalized:', \(total / \(4*B*T\)\).item\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
